items.title: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
items.content: <article>Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission</article>

items.title: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
items.content: <article>We’re introducing new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber.</article>

items.title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
items.content: <article>Google introduces Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, a lightweight cybersecurity model to find and patch vulnerabilities.</article>

items.title: Our approach to bioresilience
items.content: <article>Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.</article>

items.title: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
items.content: <article>Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.</article>
